## Pre-Market Watchlist — 2026-05-20

**Market regime:** S&P futures green, mild risk-on. Energy and software are the clear leaders today. Proceeding with watchlist.

**SYMBOL:** EOG  
**THESIS:** EOG Resources is a best-in-class US E&P with low breakevens; WTI at ~$113.70 (+1.15% today) directly expands free cash flow and typically drives the stock higher in a sustained oil rally.  
**ENTRY_AROUND:** Verify vs. current price; enter only if above 50-day MA with above-average volume confirmation  
**STOP_LOSS:** 7% below entry  
**TARGET:** +15% at scale-out tier 1, +20% final exit

## Pre-Entry Checklist (run on all 5 before touching any)

| Check | Tool/Source |
|---|---|
| Current price vs. 50-day MA | Your broker / TradingView |
| RSI 14-day (skip if >70) | TradingView |
| Earnings date (skip if <3 days away) | Earnings Whispers / broker calendar |
| Volume today vs. 30-day avg | Broker level 2 / TradingView |
| Any breaking negative news | Pre-market news scan |

- **Semis (AMAT cohort):** profit-taking pressure today despite strong fundamentals — risk/reward unfavorable for a fresh entry

PLTR and LLY are secondary if RSI and MA conditions clear. Size each at ~$5,000 max (~5% of portfolio) per the strategy rules.
